3059280.name: Brickoid
3059280.description:
GAME MUSIC SAFE TO LIVESTREAM

Earth is gone. Bricks are to blame.

As the last surviving pilot aboard the spaceship Brickoid, you are humanity’s final hope. Equipped with the strangest of weapons—your balls—you must face wave after wave of interstellar bricks and uncover the truth behind their origin.

🪐 Gameplay Features

  • Control four paddles at once around your ship for full 360° defense

  • Battle through 30 handcrafted levels with diverse brick layouts and mechanics

  • Choose your mode:
        • Adventure (narrative-driven campaign)
        • Time Attack (race the clock)
        • Practice (replay levels freely)

  • Master gravity-altering black and white holes, power-ups, and trick bricks

  • Immerse yourself in a retro-futuristic atmosphere in deep space

  • Unlock a mysterious, real-world reward at the end of your journey—if you can survive that long

📖 Echoes of Humanity
What starts as a desperate counterattack becomes something much bigger. Strange patterns emerge in the bricks. Transmissions suggest a conspiracy. And the more you fight, the more the line between enemy and ally begins to blur.

As you progress through the nine chapters of this absurd and eerie sci-fi saga, you’ll gather fragments, decrypt codes, question loyalties—and maybe even laugh at how weird this all is.

Your mission is clear:
Keep the balls in play. Smash through the lies. And save what’s left of Earth.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
